instruction: Figure out a way to combine these 2 ideas

result.summary: Created one crossover that preserves four-ring Pinch/Sweep/Rake movement and converts the first three successful evasions into Capacitor, Lancer, and Phase Guard unlocks, removing power pickups entirely. Live two-pass checks confirmed visible rings/HUD, player and attachment motion, moving enemies and hazards, restart, first-evasion Capacitor unlock, preview capture, and zero console errors. Sealed n_0008 was excluded after its persistent background occluded immediate-mode rings and HUD; n_0009 repairs only that rendering issue.
